title: CRITICAL: Icon Management API Endpoints Not Implemented
description:
## Summary
All 5 documented icon management endpoints return 404 Not Found despite having complete implementation files, services, and documentation.

## Affected Endpoints
- POST /v1/icons/organizations/{org_id} - Upload icon
- GET /v1/icons/{icon_id} - Serve icon
- PATCH /v1/icons/organizations/{org_id}/{icon_id} - Update metadata
- DELETE /v1/icons/organizations/{org_id}/icons/{icon_id} - Delete icon
- GET /v1/icons/organizations/{org_id} - List icons

## Root Cause
The icon router is not registered in app/main.py despite having:
- Complete OpenAPI specification
- Icon service implementation (app/services/icons/icon_service.py)
- Database models and repositories
- Comprehensive API documentation

## Impact
- Icon management feature is completely non-functional
- Users cannot upload, view, or manage icons
- Assistant icon assignment will fail

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Make any request to /v1/icons/* endpoints
2. Receive 404 Not Found

## Expected Behavior
Endpoints should be functional and return appropriate responses

## Test Results
- 22 test cases created covering happy path, sad path, security, and edge cases
- All tests fail with 404 Not Found
- Test suite: v1-icons.json
suggestedFix:
Register icon router in app/main.py:
1. Import icon router
2. Add app.include_router(icon_router, prefix='/v1/icons', tags=['Icons'])
businessImpact: High - Core feature completely unavailable to all users
